overall.description: Third-person gameplay from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing the protagonist Arthur Morgan walking along a dirt path through rural countryside. The character passes horse-drawn wagons and transitions from a wooded area to open farmland with wooden fences and distant views of a settlement.

scene_state.functional_zone: forested trail with dense tree cover

events.description: horse-drawn covered wagon overtakes the character from the left side

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a dirt path through a shaded forested area

notable_agents.action: covered wagon with two horses moving past the character from behind

entered.detail: reddish-brown dirt trail winding through the forest
tall deciduous trees with dense green foliage lining the path
tall deciduous trees with dense green foliage lining the path
sunlit grassy area visible between the trees on the right

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow dirt trail through a densely forested area. Tall trees line both sides of the path, creating partial shade. A horse-drawn wagon overtakes the character from the left, moving along the same trail.

events.description: forest canopy opens up to reveal expansive view of distant settlement and rolling hills

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path as the landscape transitions to open fields with distant views

entered.detail: cluster of buildings and structures visible on the horizon across the valley
isolated trees spaced apart across the grassy landscape
open grassy meadow with tall green grass
weathered wooden fence posts beginning to line the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The forest gives way to open countryside, revealing a panoramic view of a distant settlement on the horizon. The path continues through grassy fields with scattered trees, and a wooden fence begins to appear along the right side of the trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: fenced country road approaching rural buildings

events.description: second horse-drawn wagon passes from left to right moving ahead on the path

agents.ego_description: walking along the increasingly fenced road as another wagon passes by

notable_agents.action: covered wagon with horses moving past and continuing down the road

entered.detail: wooden fence running parallel to the left side of the dirt road
prominent large tree with spreading branches providing shade

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a fenced country road with wooden barriers on both sides. A second horse-drawn wagon passes by on the left. The distant settlement remains visible ahead, and a large tree stands prominently on the left side of the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural fenced road with pasture land

events.description: rider on horseback appears stationary near the fence on the left side

agents.ego_description: continuing along the winding fenced path, approaching and passing a horse rider

notable_agents.action: mounted rider on horseback standing near the wooden fence

entered.detail: gently rolling green hills extending into the distance

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the fenced dirt road through rolling pastoral landscape. A rider on horseback stands near the fence on the left side as the character passes by. The distant settlement is no longer visible as the path curves through the open countryside.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a character travels from a shaded forest trail into an expansive, open pastoral landscape. It begins on a narrow dirt path flanked by dense trees, where a horse-drawn wagon overtakes the character from the left. As the forest gives way to the open countryside, the view expands to reveal a distant settlement on the horizon and a wooden fence appearing along the right side of the trail. The scene then shifts to a fully fenced country road where a second wagon passes by and a large, prominent tree stands to the left. Finally, the path curves through rolling fields past a rider on horseback, as the distant settlement disappears from view behind the undulating terrain.
